# Step 2 — PR Detail (Purchaser Read-Only View)

> The full-page detail view for a Purchase Request when opened by the Purchase Officer. All fields are read-only until the purchaser clicks **Edit**. Contains two tabs: **Items** (default) and **Workflow History**.

![PR Detail — Items Tab](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 2.1 Access Path

```
PR List → click PR No. button (blue text)
```

Direct URL: `/procurement/purchase-request/{uuid}`

**Permissions required:** Purchasing Staff role with view access to all departments.

---

## 2.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> detail["2. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["3. Edit Mode - Vendor and Pricing"]
    edit --> actions["4. Workflow Actions - Approve / Reject / Send for Review"]
    actions --> done(["PR Advanced or Returned"])
    style detail fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 2.3 Page Layout

```
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ← Procurement / Purchase Request                               │
│  PR20260400060                          [Edit] [Comment] [Approve] │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  HEADER INFO                                                     │
│  Date: 2026-04-07   Requestor: ศิริวรรณ...   Status: IN PROGRESS │
│  Department: Guest Service and Bell Staff                        │
│  Workflow: ●——●——●——●——● (stage dots)                           │
│  Description: ada dsa                                            │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  [Items ▼] [Workflow History]                     [Expand all]  │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ITEMS GRID                                                      │
│  # │ Location │ Product │ Requested │ Approved │ FOC │ Amount │ ... │
│  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────│
│  FINANCIAL SUMMARY: Subtotal │ Discount │ Net │ Tax │ Total    │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 2.4 PR Header Fields

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|-------|----------------|-------------|--------|
| PR No. | View Only | Auto-generated reference, e.g. `PR20260400060` | Format: PR[YYMM][NNNN] |
| Date | View Only | PR creation date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Status badge | View Only | Current PR status | IN PROGRESS (yellow) |
| Requestor | View Only | Name of user who created the PR | From user profile |
| Department | View Only | Creator's department | e.g. Guest Service and Bell Staff |
| Workflow indicator | View Only | Stage dots showing progress through HOD → Purchase → FC → GM → Owner | Current stage highlighted |
| Description | View Only | Free-text purpose of the PR | May be blank |

---

## 2.5 Items Tab — Grid Columns

| Column | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|--------|----------------|-------------|--------|
| # | View Only | Row sequence number | — |
| Location | View Only | Delivery location / store | e.g. A&S Accounting |
| Product | View Only | Item name and product code | Click to expand row |
| Requested | View Only | Quantity requested by Creator | 3 decimal places |
| Approved | View Only | Quantity approved by HOD | May differ from Requested; dash if not yet approved |
| FOC | View Only | Free of Charge quantity | Set by Purchasing staff in Edit Mode; hidden from Creator |
| Amount | View Only | Item total (qty × unit price) | 2 decimal places; 0.00 until purchaser sets unit price |
| Currency | View Only | Item transaction currency | e.g. THB |
| Delivery Point | View Only | Specific delivery sub-location | e.g. Main |
| Expand icon | View Only | Expands row to show full item detail | — |

> **Note:** Vendor, Unit Price, Tax Profile, and Tax Amount columns are visible to the purchaser in read-only mode but are blank/zero until the purchaser enters Edit Mode and populates them.

---

## 2.6 Financial Summary (bottom of Items tab)

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|-------|----------------|-------------|--------|
| Subtotal | View Only | Sum of (Qty × Unit Price) for all items | 2 decimal places |
| Discount | View Only | Total discount across all items | Rate % or override amount |
| Net Amount | View Only | Subtotal − Discount | 2 decimal places |
| Tax | View Only | Total tax across all items | Per Tax Profile on each item |
| **Total** | View Only | Net + Tax — the amount for PO conversion | Bold; 2 decimal places |
| Currency | View Only | Transaction currency for this PR | e.g. THB |

> **Multi-currency:** If item currency differs from base currency, a secondary amount in green text (base currency) appears below each primary amount (FR-PR-029).

> ⚠️ **TBC — Dual Display Verification:** The following scenarios require confirmation with a live multi-currency or mixed-unit PR:
>
> | Scenario | Expected Behaviour | Verified? |
> |----------|--------------------|-----------|
> | Document currency ≠ base currency (e.g. USD PR, THB base) | All monetary fields show transaction amount (primary) + base currency amount (green, smaller font) | TBC — test PR uses THB matching base |
> | All items in base currency | Single currency display — no green secondary amounts | TBC |
> | Item order unit ≠ base inventory unit (e.g. ordered in BOX, base = KG) | FR-PR-003/FR-PR-028: prices normalised to base unit for Auto Allocate comparison. Check whether item grid shows order unit quantity AND base unit equivalent side-by-side | TBC — not confirmed in live UI |
> | Mixed PR: some items foreign currency, some base | Per-item dual display for foreign items; single display for base-currency items | TBC |
>
> **Recommended test:** Create a PR with a non-THB line item, enter Edit Mode as Purchasing Staff, and verify dual currency amounts render in the items grid and financial summary.

---

## 2.7 Workflow History Tab

Shows the approval timeline for this PR.

![Workflow History Tab](data:image/png;base64,)

| Element | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| Stage node | Circle with stage name (e.g. HOD, Purchase) |
| Date / Time | When the stage action was taken, e.g. `2026-04-07 16:26` |
| Actor | Name and role of user who acted, e.g. `อีริยา (HOD) ตัน` |
| Arrow label | Action taken, e.g. PRO → Purchase |
| Current stage | Highlighted / active node |

---

## 2.8 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

> **Form state:** Read-Only Mode. All fields display-only; no inline editing available until Edit is clicked.

### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Visible When | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|-------------|-------------------|
| **Edit** | Blue / Primary | PR is at Purchase stage and user is Purchasing Staff | Enter Edit Mode to allocate vendors and set pricing — the primary purchaser action for a PR at this stage |
| **Comment** | Outline | Always | Add an internal note to the PR thread without changing workflow state — use for questions or audit trail |
| **Approve** | Green / Primary | PR is at a stage where this user can act | Advance the PR to the next approval stage — opens the Approve confirmation dialog |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD (FR-PR-005A) specifies Purchasing Staff actions as **Reject**, **Return**, and **Submit** (not Approve). The live UI shows only **Edit**, **Comment**, and **Approve** — no Reject or Return buttons were observed on the captured PR. This may indicate Submit is labelled "Approve" in the UI, or Reject/Return appear only under specific conditions. Verify with the development team.

### On Edit

**Purpose / Use Case:** Switch to Edit Mode to enter vendor selection, unit prices, discounts, and tax profiles for each line item.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PR is at Purchase stage | FR-PR-011A | Edit Mode activated; Cancel / Save buttons appear | Edit button not visible |
| 2 | PR not locked by another user | FR-PR-011 | Edit Mode activated | TBC — lock indicator not confirmed in live UI |

### On Approve

**Purpose / Use Case:** Advance the PR to the next workflow stage (FC review) once the purchasing allocation is complete.

See step-04 §4.4 for full Approve validation.

### On Comment

**Purpose / Use Case:** Add an internal note or question without changing the PR status or routing.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Comment text is not empty | FR-PR-008 | Comment added to thread with author, role, and timestamp | Submit button inactive |

---

## 2.9 Expand All / Collapse All

A toggle button in the Items tab header expands or collapses all item rows to show/hide the full item detail sub-row (which includes product notes, delivery date, etc.).

---

## 2.10 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | Purchaser sees all vendor/pricing fields in read-only mode regardless of Creator's hide_price setting | FR-PR-011A note |
| BR-02 | FOC quantity visible to Purchasing Staff; hidden from Creator role | FR-PR-018 |
| BR-03 | Approved Quantity reflects HOD's adjustment (may differ from Requested) | FR-PR-005A |
| BR-04 | Financial summary recalculates in real time when unit prices are updated in Edit Mode | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-05 | If item currency ≠ base currency, dual amounts displayed (transaction + base in green) | FR-PR-029 |
| BR-06 | Workflow History shows full audit trail with timestamps and actor identity | FR-PR-005 |

---

## 2.11 Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| PR has zero items | Items tab shows empty grid; Edit → Add Item to add line items |
| PR is at HOD stage (not yet routed to Purchase) | Edit and action buttons not shown; view-only header and items |
| Items have no unit price set yet | Amount column shows 0.00 or blank; financial summary shows zero totals |
| Item with FOC quantity set | FOC column shows non-zero value; Amount may be calculated differently (TBC) |
| Multi-currency PR | Dual amounts shown in items grid and summary; exchange rate badge displayed |
| Page loads slowly (Vercel cold start) | Loading spinner shown; PR content appears after networkidle (~2-15s) |
| Purchaser navigates directly to URL for a PR not at Purchase stage | Page loads but action buttons not shown (view-only) |

---

## 2.12 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| ← breadcrumb | → step-01 PR List |
| Click **Edit** | → step-03 Edit Mode |
| Click **Approve** | → step-04 Approve Dialog |
| Click **Comment** | Comment panel opens (inline) |
| Click **Workflow History** tab | Shows timeline; stays on same URL |
| Click **Items** tab | Returns to items grid |
| Click **Expand all** | Expands all item rows in-place |

---

## 2.13 API Endpoints

| Endpoint | Method | Purpose |
|----------|--------|---------|
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` | GET | Fetch PR detail |
| `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/workflow-history` | GET | Fetch approval timeline |

---

## 2.14 Status Transitions (FR-PR-006)

Status is displayed in the PR header badge. Transitions are enforced server-side.

| From | To | Trigger Action | Actor |
|------|----|----------------|-------|
| DRAFT | INPROGRESS | Submit | Creator |
| INPROGRESS | INPROGRESS | Intermediate approval | HOD (partial) |
| INPROGRESS | APPROVED | Final approval (all stages) | Last approver in chain |
| INPROGRESS | VOID | Reject | Any approver |
| INPROGRESS | RETURNED | Return / Send for Review | Any approver |
| RETURNED | INPROGRESS | Re-submit | Creator |
| APPROVED | COMPLETED | Convert to Purchase Order | System / Purchaser |
| DRAFT / INPROGRESS | CANCELLED | Cancel | Creator (with reason) |

**Status colour coding (FR-PR-006):**

| Status | Colour | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| DRAFT | Gray | Editable by Creator |
| INPROGRESS | Yellow/Amber | Routing through approvals |
| APPROVED | Green | Ready for PO conversion |
| VOID | Red | Rejected |
| RETURNED | Orange | Returned for revision |
| COMPLETED | Blue | PO created; read-only |
| CANCELLED | Gray | Manually cancelled |

> ⚠️ **Note (UI):** Live UI renders status as `INPROGRESS` (single word). BRD specifies "In-progress". Use `INPROGRESS` in API calls and test scripts.

---

## 2.15 Budget Tab (FR-PR-027)

The PR detail page includes a **Budget** tab (alongside Items and Workflow History). Purchaser (Purchasing Staff) has full CRUD access.

**Role-Based Access:**

| Action | Creator | Approver | Purchasing Staff | Finance Manager |
|--------|---------|----------|-----------------|-----------------|
| View Budget Tab | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Add Budget Entry | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Edit Budget Entry | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Delete Budget Entry | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |

**Budget Table Columns:**

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| Location | Department / cost centre (Front Office, Kitchen, etc.) |
| Category | Budget category (F&B, Equipment, Services, etc.) |
| Total Budget | Allocated budget for this Location + Category |
| Soft Commitment (Dept Head) | Committed via PR approval at HOD stage |
| Soft Commitment (PO) | Committed via issued Purchase Orders |
| Hard Commitment | Confirmed commitments |
| Available Budget | Total − Soft(Dept Head) − Soft(PO) − Hard Commitment |
| Current PR Amount | This PR's contribution |
| Status | Over Budget / Near Limit (≥80%) / Within Budget |

**Status Calculation:**

| Status | Condition |
|--------|-----------|
| Over Budget | Available Budget < 0 |
| Near Limit | Budget utilisation ≥ 80% |
| Within Budget | Available Budget ≥ 20% of Total Budget |

**Add Budget (Purchasing Staff only):**
- Opens a dialog form
- Required: Location (dropdown), Category (dropdown), Total Budget (currency field)
- Optional: Soft Commitment (Dept Head), Soft Commitment (PO), Hard Commitment, Current PR Amount
- Duplicate check: Location + Category combination must be unique per PR
- Available Budget preview updates in real time

**Edit / Delete:**
- Row action menu (⋯ icon): Edit (pre-populates form) / Delete (confirmation dialog)
- Delete shows Location + Category of entry before confirming
- Toast notification on success

**Error Messages:**
- "Location is required" | "Category is required" | "Total Budget is required"
- "Must be a valid number >= 0"
- "Budget allocation for this Location and Category already exists"

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** Budget Tab presence in the live UI was not directly verified for the Purchaser role in this session. Per FR-PR-027 ✅ Implemented, it should be accessible from the PR detail page tab bar.
